notes: src/faiss/ivf.rs remains a simplified coarse assignment scaffold, not the hot search path for IVF-PQ.
src/faiss/ivfpq.rs performs centroid selection, residual computation, PQ codebook training, and ADC search.
This artifact uses the active IvfPqIndex path, so recall reflects the real Rust IVF-PQ implementation rather than the ivf.rs placeholder.

row.confidence_explanation: 优先检查 coarse centroid search 与 residual ADC 是否仍在真实热路径；若 recall 偏低，先提高 nprobe 并复查残差量化训练质量。
